markets.title: Will the world pass 2 degrees Celsius over pre-industrial levels before 2050?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a new leader is announced.
markets.rules_primary: If Zhao Leji is announced as the first new non-interim leader of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) before Jan 1, 2045, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves when the first new non-interim leader is officially announced by the party or credible sources. The person need not have taken office before the deadline date, only be announced as the incoming leader. Interim or acting leaders do not qualify unless they are subsequently announced as the permanent leader. If multiple persons are simultaneously announced as co-leaders, the market resolves proportionally. Leadership contests that extend beyond the deadline date without an announcement resolve to No. The announcement must come from official party channels or be confirmed by multiple credible news sources.
markets.title: Will Zhao Leji become the next leader of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) before Jan 1, 2045?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a new Prime Minister takes office.
markets.rules_primary: If the first new person to hold Prime Minister of Israel after Issuance is Yariv Levin, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on who actually assumes the office of Prime Minister, not who is elected or nominated. Acting or interim appointments count as holding the position if they formally assume the office. The person must be different from whoever held the position at market issuance - if the same person continues in office through the expiration date, all markets resolve to No. Resolution is based on official announcements from the country's legislature or government, with The New York Times as a secondary source for confirmation.
markets.title: Will Yariv Levin be the next Prime Minister of Israel?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if any leader in the set leaves office.
markets.rules_primary: If the individual holding the title of Prime Minister of Japan at the time of Issuance is the first within G7 leaders to leave their position, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The individual must actually leave office and no longer hold their title. An announcement of resignation or intention to leave is not sufficient. The person who held the position at market issuance must be the one who leaves (not a successor). If a leader dies in office, all markets in the set settle at their last traded prices before the death, with the Exchange determining fair allocation if prices are not logically consistent. Leaders can leave office through resignation, removal, term limits, electoral defeat, coup, impeachment and removal, or other constitutional processes. The first leader to leave triggers resolution for all markets in the set - the one who left resolves to Yes, all others resolve to No.
markets.subtitle: :: Prime Minister of Japan
markets.title: Will Prime Minister of Japan be the first to leave office?

Leaders can leave office through resignation, removal, term limits, electoral defeat, coup, impeachment and removal, or other constitutional processes. The first leader to leave triggers resolution for all markets in the set - the one who left resolves to Yes, all others resolve to No.
markets.subtitle: :: Prime Minister of Canada
markets.title: Will Prime Minister of Canada be the first to leave office?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a leader leaves office.
markets.rules_primary: If the President of Ghana is the first leader among the above to leave office, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An announcement that a leader will leave their position is not sufficient to resolve the Payout Criterion; the individual must actually leave and no longer hold the title. If any leader leaves solely because they have died, then all markets will resolve and the Exchange will determine the payouts to the holders of long and short positions based upon the last traded price (prior to the death) or another fair price.
markets.subtitle: :: President of Ghana
markets.title: Will John Mahama leave office next in this set?

markets.early_close_condition: The market will close if a country launches a manned Moon mission.
markets.rules_primary: If United States is the first country to launch a manned mission to the Moon before Jan 1, 2031, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) or another US-based company launches a manned mission to the Moon first then the market resolves to Yes for the United States.
markets.title: Which country will be the next to send humans to the Moon?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a qualifying announcement occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If any company (public or private) officially announces that it has achieved Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) after market issuance and before Jan 1, 2031, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: To qualify, the announcement must explicitly state that the company has achieved, attained, reached, or developed Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), or that it has achieved, attained, reached, or developed “AGI.” Statements that describe “AGI-like,” “AGI-level,” “near-AGI,” or “toward AGI” systems without explicitly stating that the company has achieved/attained/reached/developed AGI do not qualify. For purposes of this market, a “company” includes any publicly traded company or any privately held company whose existence and corporate identity is verifiable and whose financing/valuation or corporate profile is covered by at least two of the listed major business news sources.
markets.title: Will any company announce that it has achieved Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) before Jan 1, 2031?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a qualifying announcement occurs.

markets.rules_secondary: To qualify, the announcement must explicitly state that the company has achieved, attained, reached, or developed Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), or that it has achieved, attained, reached, or developed “AGI.” Statements that describe “AGI-like,” “AGI-level,” “near-AGI,” or “toward AGI” systems without explicitly stating that the company has achieved/attained/reached/developed AGI do not qualify. For purposes of this market, a “company” includes any publicly traded company or any privately held company whose existence and corporate identity is verifiable and whose financing/valuation or corporate profile is covered by at least two of the listed major business news sources.
markets.title: Will any company announce that it has achieved Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) before Jan 1, 2030?
